title: Content Library v5 Upgrade

changes.description: Updated version marker from v4 to v5 in docstring
Added trafilatura as optional dependency for v5 normalization pipeline

verification.compilation: PASS - both scripts compile without errors

notes_for_orchestrator: Files were already nearly identical between main and n5os-ode export. Only two minor sanitizations needed: (1) version marker update in docstring, (2) example tag cleanup. The v5 normalization pipeline (trafilatura extraction, heuristic boilerplate removal, summary generation) is fully present and works generically. content_library.py required no changes.
